s: In 2021, Francisco Perez suited up for CLE as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 4.050, WHIP 1.350, SO 5, WAR 0.100.
Changed teams after the previous season (CLE -> WSN).
In 2022, Francisco Perez suited up for WSN as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 7.270, WHIP 2.540, SO 7, WAR -0.200. Notable context: Joined WSN.
Changed teams after the previous season (WSN -> OAK).
In 2023, Francisco Perez suited up for OAK as a pitcher. Key numbers: ERA 5.940, WHIP 1.500, SO 14, WAR 0.300. Notable context: Joined OAK.
